title: spiraea lasiocarpa var. lasiocarpa
intro: Spiraea lasiocarpa var. lasiocarpa, also known as Alpine Rose, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Spiraea lasiocarpa var. lasiocarpa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments, including fever and respiratory issues.
